name: Antipasto Steak Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 pound beef (boneless top sirloin steak), 1 inch thick
1 bunch romaine lettuce (torn into bite-size pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat coals or gas grill.
2. Sprinkle beef with pepper.
3. Cover and grill beef 4 to 6 inches from medium heat for 15 to 18 minutes, turning once, until medium doneness is reached.
4. Cut beef across grain into thin slices.
5. Toss romaine, croutons, cheese, and dressing together.
6. Top with beef slices.
7. Serve with additional shredded Parmesan cheese if desired.
